name: forecast
title: Forecast Widget
description: The dashboard's capacity / predictive forecast renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="forecast") is filled by the OOW.forecast renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a 4-row gridline backdrop, right-aligned y-axis labels, a solid line of observed history, a dashed line projecting the forecast horizon, a confidence cone that widens downrange as uncertainty grows, a dashed vertical separator marking 'now' (observed vs forecast), and a marker dot at the handoff. The forecast continues as a seeded random-walk from the last observed value, so output is deterministic from opts.seed and renders identically every load. The series colour is injected as generated SVG data; the grid, axis labels, separator and cone opacity are decoupled from it and themed from design tokens. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment. opts: seed, color (SVAR key or hex), n (history samples), fc (forecast samples).
